name: Golden Triangle Tour
overview: Explore the best of Delhi, Agra, Jaipur with our expertly crafted tour package. Mother India Tour Travels provides comfortable AC vehicles, experienced guides, and hand-picked accommodations to make your journey unforgettable.
inclusions: Accommodation in listed or similar hotels
All transfers and sightseeing by private AC vehicle
All long distance travel as per itinerary
Chauffeur, Toll Taxes, Parking, Fuel charges
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
exclusions: Personal expenses (porterage, tips, laundry, mineral water)
Monument entrance fees and camera charges
Any activity not mentioned in inclusions
Additional cost due to flight cancellation, roadblocks, political unrest
notes: Taj Mahal is closed every Friday
Prices are per person on twin sharing basis

itinerary.title: Delhi to Agra (250 Kms
itinerary.description: Delhi to Agra (250 Kms. 3-4 Hrs. approx.): Early Arrival at Delhi Airport/railway station company representatives assisted you, and a guided tour to visit Qutub minar, Lotus temple, India gate & proceed to Agra & overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Agra to Jaipur (250 KM
itinerary.description: Agra to Jaipur (250 KM. Approx. 3-4 Hrs. approx.): Early morning Sun rise time a guided tour to visit Taj Mahal, after breakfast, check out from the hotel & proceed to Jaipur En-Route stop to visit Fatehpur Sikri, Lunch on the way (direct payment basis). Overnight stay at the hotel Jaipur.

itinerary.title: Jaipur Sightseeing; Today after breakfast, a guided to the ancient capital of Am
itinerary.description: Jaipur Sightseeing; Today after breakfast, a guided to the ancient capital of Amber, visiting beautiful Amber Fort, Water Palace, Hawa Mahal (Window Palace), City Place and Observatory (Jantar Mantar) and famous block printing & Rajasthani handicraft work being done for centuries in Jaipur. Overnight stay at the hotel.

itinerary.title: Jaipur to Delhi (280 KM
itinerary.description:
Jaipur to Delhi (280 KM. Approx. 5-6 Hrs.): Today after breakfast, proceed to Delhi and drop you at the Airport/Railway station with sweet memories.
Please note: Taj Mahal Close on Every Friday
Please note: We can arrange tailor-made tours
Inclusions
Accommodation
Welcome Drink Non Alcoholic.
Meals
All Transfers, All sightseeing as per Tour Itinerary
All long distance Travels
Driver Allowance, Toll Taxes, Parkings, Fuel
State Taxes, Green Taxes, Road Taxes
Comfortable vehicles AC
Chauffeur
Guide

itinerary.description: Agra to Jaipur (260 Kms. 6 Hrs. Approx.) Today after breakfast we proceeded to Jaipur on the way to visit Fatehpur Sikri. Overnight stay at the hotel.
